subcodes.first_line: O ye Friends of God! It is understood that a wall has been put up around the Bombay Cemetery, and that water supply is now available.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی از قرار معلوم زمین قبرستان بمبئی را مدتیست حصار کشیده اند و حال
subcodes.subjects: @law of burial and cremation, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir]
